import numpy as np
from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer
import faiss

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokenized = query.lower().split()

    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    vec_distances, vec_ids = index.search(query_vec, top_k * 15)
    vec_ids = vec_ids[0]
    vec_distances = vec_distances[0]

    vec_cands = [int(i) for i in vec_ids if i != -1]
    vec_dist_cands = [d for i, d in zip(vec_ids, vec_distances) if i != -1]

    bm25_scores_all = bm25.get_scores(tokenized)
    bm25_top_idxs = np.argsort(bm25_scores_all)[::-1][: top_k * 15]
    bm25_cands = bm25_top_idxs.tolist()
    bm25_cand_scores = bm25_scores_all[bm25_top_idxs]

    cand_set = set(vec_cands) | set(bm25_cands)
    cand_ids = list(cand_set)

    bm25_cand_scores = np.array([bm25_scores_all[i] for i in cand_ids])

    title_bm25 = BM25Okapi(df['title'].apply(lambda x: x.lower().split()))
    title_bm25_scores_all = title_bm25.get_scores(tokenized)
    title_bm25_cand_scores = np.array([title_bm25_scores_all[i] for i in cand_ids])

    vec_id_to_dist = {cid: d for cid, d in zip(vec_cands, vec_dist_cands)}
    max_dist = max(vec_dist_cands) if vec_dist_cands else 1.0
    faiss_distances = np.array([vec_id_to_dist.get(i, max_dist) for i in cand_ids])

    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-bm25_cand_scores))
    faiss_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(faiss_distances))

    rrf_scores = 1 / (bm25_ranks + faiss_ranks)

    vote_counts = df.iloc[cand_ids]['vote_count'].values
    vote_averages = df.iloc[cand_ids]['vote_average'].values
    rrf_scores *= np.log(vote_counts + 1) * vote_averages

    top_idx = np.argsort(rrf_scores)[::-1][:top_k]
    top_cand_ids = [cand_ids[i] for i in top_idx]

    return df.iloc[top_cand_ids][["title", "overview"]].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer
import faiss

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokenized = query.lower().split()

    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    vec_distances, vec_ids = index.search(query_vec, top_k * 15)
    vec_ids = vec_ids[0]
    vec_distances = vec_distances[0]

    vec_cands = [int(i) for i in vec_ids if i != -1]
    vec_dist_cands = [d for i, d in zip(vec_ids, vec_distances) if i != -1]

    bm25_scores_all = bm25.get_scores(tokenized)
    bm25_top_idxs = np.argsort(bm25_scores_all)[::-1][: top_k * 15]
    bm25_cands = bm25_top_idxs.tolist()
    bm25_cand_scores = bm25_scores_all[bm25_top_idxs]

    title_bm25 = BM25Okapi(df['title'].apply(lambda x: x.lower().split()))
    title_bm25_scores_all = title_bm25.get_scores(tokenized)
    title_bm25_top_idxs = np.argsort(title_bm25_scores_all)[::-1][: top_k * 15]
    title_bm25_cands = title_bm25_top_idxs.tolist()
    title_bm25_cand_scores = title_bm25_scores_all[title_bm25_top_idxs]

    cand_set = set(vec_cands) | set(bm25_cands) | set(title_bm25_cands)
    cand_ids = list(cand_set)

    bm25_cand_scores = np.array([bm25_scores_all[i] for i in cand_ids])
    title_bm25_cand_scores = np.array([title_bm25_scores_all[i] for i in cand_ids])

    vec_id_to_dist = {cid: d for cid, d in zip(vec_cands, vec_dist_cands)}
    max_dist = max(vec_dist_cands) if vec_dist_cands else 1.0
    faiss_distances = np.array([vec_id_to_dist.get(i, max_dist) for i in cand_ids])

    bm25_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-bm25_cand_scores))
    title_bm25_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(-title_bm25_cand_scores))
    faiss_ranks = np.argsort(np.argsort(faiss_distances))

    rrf_scores = 1 / (bm25_ranks + faiss_ranks + title_bm25_ranks)

    vote_counts = df.iloc[cand_ids]['vote_count'].values
    vote_averages = df.iloc[cand_ids]['vote_average'].values
    rrf_scores *= np.log(vote_counts + 1) * vote_averages

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import faiss

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokenized = query.lower().split()
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    vec_distances, vec_ids = index.search(query_vec, top_k * 5)
    vec_ids = vec_ids[0]
    
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokenized)
    bm25_cands = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-50:]
    
    cand_ids = np.unique(np.concatenate([vec_ids[vec_ids != -1], bm25_cands]))
    
    bm25_s = bm25_scores[cand_ids]
    
    faiss_s = np.zeros(len(cand_ids))
    for i, cid in enumerate(cand_ids):
        idx = np.where(vec_ids == cid)[0]
        faiss_s[i] = vec_distances[0][idx[0]] if len(idx) > 0 else 100.0
        
    bm25_r = np.argsort(np.argsort(-bm25_s))
    faiss_r = np.argsort(np.argsort(faiss_s))
    
    rrf = 1.0 / (bm25_r + faiss_r + 60)
    
    boost = df.iloc[cand_ids]['vote_average'].values * np.log1p(df.iloc[cand_ids]['vote_count'].values)
    final_scores = rrf * boost
    
    top_idx = cand_ids[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_idx][["title", "overview"]].to_dict("records")

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokenized = query.lower().split()
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    vec_distances, vec_ids = index.search(query_vec, 100)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokenized)
    
    # RRF constants
    k_rrf = 60
    
    # Get all candidate indices
    top_bm25_idx = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-100:]
    top_vec_idx = vec_ids[0]
    
    all_cands = np.unique(np.concatenate([top_bm25_idx, top_vec_idx]))
    rrf_scores = np.zeros(len(all_cands))
    
    # Map for fast lookup
    id_to_idx = {idx: i for i, idx in enumerate(all_cands)}
    
    # BM25 contribution
    for rank, idx in enumerate(np.argsort(bm25_scores[all_cands])[-len(all_cands):]):
        rrf_scores[idx] += 1 / (k_rrf + (len(all_cands) - rank))
        
    # Vector contribution
    for rank, idx in enumerate(top_vec_idx):
        if idx != -1 and idx in id_to_idx:
            rrf_scores[id_to_idx[idx]] += 1 / (k_rrf + rank + 1)
            
    top_idx = all_cands[np.argsort(rrf_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_idx][["title", "overview"]].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np
from rank_bm25 import BM25Okapi
import faiss

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    tokenized = query.lower().split()
    query_vec = model.encode([query]).astype("float32")
    
    vec_distances, vec_ids = index.search(query_vec, top_k * 10)
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(tokenized)
    
    # Simple hybrid: top BM25 + top Vector
    bm25_cands = np.argsort(bm25_scores)[-100:]
    vec_cands = vec_ids[0][vec_ids[0] != -1]
    cand_ids = np.unique(np.concatenate([bm25_cands, vec_cands]))
    
    # Normalize scores
    b_scores = bm25_scores[cand_ids]
    b_scores = (b_scores - b_scores.min()) / (b_scores.max() - b_scores.min() + 1e-9)
    
    v_scores = np.full(len(cand_ids), 100.0)
    for i, cid in enumerate(cand_ids):
        match = np.where(vec_ids[0] == cid)[0]
        if len(match) > 0:
            v_scores[i] = vec_distances[0][match[0]]
    v_scores = 1.0 - (v_scores / (v_scores.max() + 1e-9))
    
    boost = df.iloc[cand_ids]['vote_average'].values * np.log1p(df.iloc[cand_ids]['vote_count'].values)
    final_scores = (b_scores + v_scores) * boost
    
    top_idx = cand_ids[np.argsort(final_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]]
    return df.iloc[top_idx][["title", "overview"]].to_dict("records")

from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    query_vec = model.encode([query])
    _, faiss_idx = index.search(query_vec.astype("float32"), 100)
    
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(query.lower().split())
    
    # Sigmoid-like normalization to mix signals
    norm_bm25 = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-0.1 * (bm25_scores - np.mean(bm25_scores))))
    
    candidate_scores = norm_bm25[faiss_idx[0]]
    top_candidate_idx = np.argsort(candidate_scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    final_indices = faiss_idx[0][top_candidate_idx]
    return df.iloc[final_indices][["title", "overview"]].to_dict("records")

import numpy as np

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    # BM25 scores
    b_scores = bm25.get_scores(query.lower().split())
    b_norm = (b_scores - np.min(b_scores)) / (np.max(b_scores) - np.min(b_scores) + 1e-9)
    
    # Faiss scores
    vec = model.encode([query])
    f_scores, _ = index.search(vec.astype("float32"), top_k * 5)
    f_scores = 1.0 / (1.0 + f_scores[0])
    f_norm = (f_scores - np.min(f_scores)) / (np.max(f_scores) - np.min(f_scores) + 1e-9)
    
    # Combined ranking
    combined = b_norm + np.interp(np.arange(len(b_scores)), np.linspace(0, len(b_scores), len(f_scores)), f_norm)
    top_idx = np.argsort(combined)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    return df.iloc[top_idx][["title", "overview"]].to_dict("records")

    base_scores = bm25.get_scores(query_tokens)
    
    # Boost matches in the title column
    title_matches = df['title'].str.lower().str.contains('|'.join(query_tokens), na=False).astype(float)
    
    scores = base_scores + (title_matches * np.mean(base_scores) * 2.0)
    top_idx = np.argsort(scores)[-top_k:][::-1]
    
    return df.iloc[top_idx][["title", "overview"]].to_dict("records")

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
    query_tokens = query.lower().split()
    bm25_scores = bm25.get_scores(query_tokens)
    
    vec = model.encode([query])
    dists, top_idx = index.search(vec.astype("float32"), 50)
    
    candidate_idx = top_idx[0]
    scores = -dists[0]
    norm_scores = (scores - scores.min()) / (scores.max() - scores.min() + 1e-9)
    
    bm25_subset = bm25_scores[candidate_idx]
    norm_bm25 = (bm25_subset - bm25_subset.min()) / (bm25_subset.max() - bm25_subset.min() + 1e-9)
    
    final_scores = norm_scores + norm_bm25
    ranked_idx = candidate_idx[np.argsort(-final_scores)]
    
    return df.iloc[ranked_idx[:top_k]][["title", "overview"]].to_dict("records")

def search(query, df, bm25, model, index, top_k=10):
